g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the sender PC do before sending a packet?')
sendPrompt('What does Router 1 do when it receives the frame from PC A?')
sendPrompt('What does Router 2 do when it receives the frame from Router 1?')
sendPrompt('How does PC B receive and process the final packet?')
sendPrompt('Why does the source MAC belong to PC A on the first hop?')
sendPrompt('Why is the destination MAC the router interface on hop 1?')

svg.text: Router 1 — strips old frame, rewrites MAC, decrements TTL

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What happens to the Ethernet frame when it arrives at Router 1?')
sendPrompt('How does Router 1 decide where to forward the packet?')
sendPrompt('How does Router 1 know R2 left MAC address?')

svg.text: Hop 2 — new Ethernet frame, same IP packet

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is the source MAC now R1-right and not PC A?')
sendPrompt('Why is the destination MAC now R2-left?')

svg.text: What changes each hop vs what stays the same
